title: Cow Toots
description: Cow Toots, a lovingly ridiculous deeply serious, extremely dignified Minecraft mod that turns ordinary Minecraft cows into the undisputed stars of the pasture.
body:
**Cow Toots**, a lovingly ridiculous deeply serious, extremely dignified Minecraft mod that turns ordinary Minecraft cows into the undisputed stars of the pasture. 

**Press B** to kick off the Bovine Boogy, adult cows freeze mid-moo and strike their best “I meant to do that” pose. Every so often a cow releases a perfectly harmless “normal toot” – a tiny puff of smoke drifting away on the breeze. 

But very special cows, on very special days, remember they love life, grass and questionable choices. These 32 cows bless the world with glorious rainbow toots sparkling plumes that look like the universe sneezed glitter. There’s no sound, no stink, just joyful visual chaos.

Of course, no truly legendary barnyard performance is complete without… toots. From time to time, relaxed cows let out harmless little puffs of smoke, soft cartoony puffs that drift away on the blocky breeze. No sound, no grossness, just silly visual fun.

Gently capped, and set to time out after a short while 120 seconds, so you can’t accidentally leave half the overworld permanently locked in disco mode. It’s lightweight, single-player friendly, and perfect for cozy family worlds, chaotic friend servers, or anyone who thinks Minecraft needs just a tiny bit more utterly unnecessary joy.

Cow Toots doesn’t make you stronger. It just makes your cows fabulous. It adds a button, some dancing, a few dignified little puffs, and a reason to smile at your cows again. Moo!

The server stays in charge, cows unfreeze after a short timeout, and hard caps stop you accidentally turning a mega–cow farm into a lag-powered particle collider. The client handles the keybind, cute chat icons, and dancing visuals, the server handles the serious business of deciding which cows boogy and which ones just chew cud.
